title: Sonic Screech pre-battle roll applies no-Atk-damage status

card.rawText: Prior to each battle, the equipped creature must roll 1 die. If the result is: 1-2: The effect ends. Destroy this card. 3-6: Equipped creature receives 5 damage, and cannot cause Atk damage.

effect.value: Roll: 1-2 destroy this card; 3-6 take 5 damage and cannot cause Atk damage

plan.title: Sonic Screech pre-battle roll applies no-Atk-damage status
plan.summary: Attach Sonic Screech, force a 3-6 pre-battle roll, and verify status/damage route is represented.

notes: Pre-place Sonic Screech on field magic slot attached to player_1 primary creature.
On 3-6, equipped creature receives 5 damage and cannot cause Atk damage for current battle.

steps: Resolve Sonic Screech pre-battle roll as 6.
Verify current-battle status route is represented.

expectedAssertions.label: Sonic Screech status route emitted evidence

manualVerification: Verify against card text: Prior to each battle, the equipped creature must roll 1 die. If the result is: 1-2: The effect ends. Destroy this card. 3-6: Equipped creature receives 5 damage, and cannot cause Atk damage.
riskNotes: Card is marked needsReview; this fixture checks the 3-6 branch route, not the 1-2 destroy branch.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_071_sonic_screech-071-e01 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
